2023-05-23T06:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2023-05-23T06:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

description.LOCATION_EN: Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road
description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2023-05-24T06:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2023-05-24T06:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2023-05-24T06:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to malfunction of traffic lights, motorists are not allowed from left turning from Queen's Road East (Sai Wan bound) onto Kennedy Road and motorists are also not allowed from right turning from Kennedy Road (downhill bound) onto Queen's Road East.
2023-05-24T06:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於交通燈失靈，駕駛人士不能由皇后大道東(西環方向)左轉入堅尼地道，而駕駛人士亦不能由堅尼地道(落山方向)右轉入皇后大道東。

2023-05-24T08:05:00.CONTENT_EN: All traffic lights at the junction of Queen's Road East and Kennedy Road have resumed normal services.
2023-05-24T08:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 所有位於皇后大道東及堅尼地道交界處的交通燈已恢復正常運作。

2023-05-24T06:24:00.CONTENT_EN:
